name: hb_7_32
requirements: As part of your analysis, for company 2419 -> station 179 over the 24h ending 2025-07-02 15:00 compute and store: distance_km, bearing_deg, station_mean_pm25, station_max_pm25, company_total_flue_gas (float).

turns.query: Help me analyze the hourly pollution trend at the 24-hour period ending 2025-07-02 15:00 for Monitoring Station (station_id: 179), correlating with emissions from Tangshan Donghua Steel Enterprise Group (company_id: 2419).
